他要打造世界第一村。
几年后，记者采访陆皓：“陆先生，请问您是靠什么让陆家村成为世界第一村的？”
陆皓：“站在时代风口浪尖，猪都能飞起来。”
记者：“您的意思是时代造就了陆家村？”
陆皓笑着摇摇头：“不！我的意思是陆家村造就了时代！”
“那您最初的初衷是什么？是为了钱嘛？”
“我对钱一点不感兴趣，我只是想让村里人过得幸福亿点点。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oad8fcf402638808e6fe138e133c6a52f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三月新茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7262535088464727102","book_name":"90乡村，重生致富之路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7262535125819212350","read_count":"299","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"627862"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"307","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,重生,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c21f5728aff98b08cfaa294b2bc9d422~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779469874&x-signature=wtwHxYUC4vqqVijBWmv875LIk0o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2079914426392188","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.7102324e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011114057E7CCA637CCCC73459"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2246,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19348,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3709},"user_act
